project_root_id.description: Stable identifier for the project root

project_root_path.description: Absolute path to the project root

staging_depth.description: Depth at which the staging zone ends

governed_min_depth.description: Minimum depth at which files/directories become governed

patterns.description: Glob patterns for excluded paths relative to the project root

separator.description: Separator between the ID and the original filename

python_prefix.description: Prefix applied to Python files before the file ID

registry_path.description: Path to unified registry file for governance records

patch_output_dir.description: Directory where registry patch files are written

allocator_store_path.description: Location of persistent allocator store outside the project root

lock_timeout_ms.description: Timeout in milliseconds for acquiring the allocator lock
